title: The Charge of the Light Brigade
author: Alfred, Lord Tennyson
content: “Theirs not to make reply, Theirs not to reason why, Theirs but to do and die.”

title: The Hollow Men
author: T.S. Eliot
content: “This is the way the world ends, Not with a bang but a whimper.”
action: Prevent a slow decay of your standards.

title: Do not go gentle into that good night
author: Dylan Thomas
content: “Rage, rage against the dying of the light.”

title: The Love Song of J. Alfred Prufrock
author: T.S. Eliot
content: “Do I dare to eat a peach?”
action: Take the risk you are overthinking.

title: Hope is the thing with feathers
author: Emily Dickinson
content: “Hope is the thing with feathers That perches in the soul.”
action: Secure the vision that drives your momentum.
